comment: 12-week rotating practice focus for the Sunday Transmission. Edit freely — the drafting agent quotes one entry per week (ISO week number modulo 12).

weeks.zh: 呼吸的长度：吸气和呼气一样长，练习就稳了
weeks.en: Equal length inhale and exhale steadies the whole practice

weeks.zh: 跳穿越前先找到班达：先提起，再移动
weeks.en: Find the bandha before the jump through: lift first, then move

weeks.zh: 后弯从胸口开始，不是从腰开始
weeks.en: The backbend begins in the chest, not the lower back

weeks.zh: 脚挂头的钥匙在髋：每天一点点，别着急
weeks.en: Leg behind head lives in the hips: a little every day, no hurry

weeks.zh: 眼睛看哪里，心就在哪里：这周守住凝视点
weeks.en: Where the eyes go, the mind goes: hold your drishti this week

weeks.zh: 前屈时慢慢呼气，身体会自己下去
weeks.en: Exhale slowly in the forward fold and the body goes down by itself

weeks.zh: 拜日式里收腹：每一个 Surya 都是练班达的机会
weeks.en: Uddiyana in every Surya: each round is bandha practice

weeks.zh: 跳回时轻轻落地，声音越小，控制越好
weeks.en: Land softly in the jump back: the quieter the landing, the better the control

weeks.zh: 选一个难的体式，这周只加深一点点
weeks.en: Pick one hard asana and go one small step deeper this week

weeks.zh: Savasana 不是休息，是练习的一部分：躺满十分钟
weeks.en: Savasana is part of the practice, not a break: stay the full ten minutes

weeks.zh: 传统是一周六天：不求完美，只求不断
weeks.en: Six days a week is the tradition: not perfect, just unbroken

weeks.zh: 月亮日休息也是练习：身体需要空隙
weeks.en: Rest on moon days is also practice: the body needs the gap
